texto: This is the gift and the sorrow of the Athanate
autor: to see your loves pass before you like the days of summer while your heart still beats. To keep your vigil in the shadows and rise again with every sun.
explicacao: Citação de to see your loves pass before you like the days of summer while your heart still beats. To keep your vigil in the shadows and rise again with every sun. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “This is the gift and the sorrow of the Athanate” articula reflexao, mark-henwick, sleight-of-hand em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como sleight-of-hand.
